title: centaurea kavadarensis
intro: Centaurea kavadarensis, a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. Native to Albania, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea kavadarensis include its potential to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its ability to fight off infections and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Centaurea kavadarensis typically involve the use of its flowers or leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
